RULING - Motion For Terminating Sanctions - The parties were referred by the court to see Pany Ly at 1:30 p.m. for a possible settlement. If the parties have not settled by Monday, or by 5:00 p.m. on April 24, Mr. Mayo will go to Mr. Ernst residence for the latter to show all documents in his possession.
